canonical_definition: A high-quality translation test dataset derived from WMT24 with human-written and professionally post-edited references, used to evaluate translation performance without data leakage.
papers: Paired by the Teacher: Turning Unpaired Data into High-Fidelity Pairs for Low-Resource Text Generation
Video2Roleplay: A Multimodal Dataset and Framework for Video-Guided Role-playing Agents

relationships.paper: Paired by the Teacher: Turning Unpaired Data into High-Fidelity Pairs for Low-Resource Text Generation
relationships.evidence: We evaluated all our original baseline models on WMT24(de, cs, zh, ru) and also included a few-shot prompting on base model as an additional baseline for comparison with our proposed method. (Section 5)
